cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, I'm calling about the study table you've listed on Oodle India.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, yes, the study table. It's a very good condition, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Can you tell me more about it? What's the material, and are there any scratches?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It's made of wood, and there's a small scratch on the corner, but it's hardly noticeable, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, that sounds good. I'd like to schedule a time to see it in person before we discuss payment.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that's perfectly fine, sir. When were you thinking of coming over?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: How about tomorrow afternoon? And just to confirm, you won't need any payment information from me during the inspection, right?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, no payment information will be needed tomorrow. We'll just discuss the details in person, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, I'll see you tomorrow then. What's the address again?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It's 123, Main Street. You can't miss it, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, got it. See you tomorrow, and thank you for your time.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, sir. Have a good day, and we'll talk tomorrow.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: You too, bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Oh, and one more thing. I'll be paying from my HSBC account.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: That's okay, sir. We'll discuss all the payment details tomorrow.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Good, I just wanted to confirm. Thanks again.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're welcome, sir. We'll talk tomorrow.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Take care, bye.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Bye, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, I'm looking forward to seeing the table tomorrow.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 105s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A user who listed a [ITEM_CATEGORY] on [MARKETPLACE_PLATFORM] receives a call from a genuine buyer who asks detailed questions about the item's condition and schedules a time to inspect it in person before discussing payment.
